mitigation.title: Enable sensitive log redaction
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by enabling redaction for sensitive runtime and tool log content.

form_schema.label: Enable automatic redaction for tool logs

mitigation.title: Enable gateway pairing authentication
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by enabling gateway pairing authentication. The remediation blocks unauthorized clients from connecting directly.

mitigation.title: Migrate from password mode
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by switching to token mode or rotating credentials. Token mode is recommended over weak password based authentication.

mitigation.title: Fix config file permissions
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by tightening config file permissions so that fewer users can read sensitive values.

form_schema.label: Fix file permissions using ACL or chmod 600

mitigation.title: Fix config directory permissions
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by tightening config directory permissions and reducing broad local access.

form_schema.label: Fix directory permissions using ACL or chmod 700

mitigation.title: Restrict gateway bind address
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by binding the gateway to a loopback address to reduce external exposure.

mitigation.title: Replace weak password protection
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by moving to token authentication or setting a stronger password.

mitigation.title: Rotate weak token
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by generating a stronger token and replacing the current credential.

mitigation.title: Enable default sandboxing
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by enabling a default sandbox backend. Isolation reduces impact on the host system.

mitigation.title: Enable agent sandboxing
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by enabling sandbox isolation for the agent execution environment.

mitigation.title: Fix log directory permissions
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by tightening log directory permissions to reduce unauthorized access or tampering.

form_schema.label: Fix directory permissions using ACL or chmod 700

mitigation.title: Enable security audit logging
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by enabling audit logging so sensitive actions and anomalies can be traced later.

mitigation.title: Restrict agent workspace access
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by limiting the agent to the workspace boundary and reducing out of scope file access.

form_schema.label: Restrict access to workspace files only

mitigation.title: Remove plaintext credentials
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by moving secrets to environment variables or by choosing manual review.

mitigation.title: Scan unreviewed skills
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by running the skill security scan and generating missing results.

mitigation.title: Remediate risky skill
mitigation.description: This risk can be fixed automatically by applying a skill remediation action such as deletion.

mitigation.title: Manually remediate NullClaw one click RCE
mitigation.description: This risk requires manual remediation and should surface guidance only. Prioritize upgrade, input hardening, and gateway runtime protections.

items.action: Check the current version and upgrade
items.detail: Run the version command and upgrade to a fixed NullClaw release.
Review startup and UI flows and remove any route that lets external URL input override gatewayUrl.
Require origin allowlisting during gateway authorization.
Avoid storing long lived sensitive tokens in plaintext browser or local storage flows.
Apply CSP, frame protections, and strict transport settings to management and gateway responses.
Restrict runtime connections to approved gateway addresses only.
Warn users whenever gatewayUrl or similar high risk configuration changes.
Add version review, code review, and focused security verification to release workflows.
Monitor unusual gateway connections, unusual origins, and suspicious credential use.
Standardize team guidance for URL trust boundaries, gateway authorization, and credential handling.
